items.title: Inside Cardano's 'Van Rossum' hard fork, and what it means for users
items.summary: The Van Rossem hard fork moved Cardano to version 11 on Saturday. And for the first time, Cardano's community voted in the upgrade, not the company that built it.

items.title: Hyperliquid plans to add decentralized prediction markets in upgrade to HIP-4
items.summary: Permissionless prediction markets will become available first on testnet and later on mainnet, Hyperliquid said.

items.title: Rust-proof your code with our new Testing Handbook chapter
items.summary: We’ve added a new chapter to our Testing Handbook: a comprehensive guide to security testing Rust programs. This chapter covers the tools and techniques we use at Trail of Bits to validate the security of Rust programs and systems. fn main() {(|f:&dyn Fn(u128)->Box< dyn Iterator<

items.title: GPT-5.5-Cyber built a zlib fuzzing lab in a day
items.summary: We’re running Patch the Planet, an ongoing collaboration with OpenAI that pairs Trail of Bits engineers directly with more than 30 open-source projects. Its goal is to front-run a serious problem facing open-source maintainers: highly capable models like GPT-5.5-Cyber will soon c

items.title: Mutation testing comes to DAML
items.summary: In April we released Mewt, our open-source mutation-testing engine that finds the gaps in your test suite. Today we’re expanding it with support for DAML, the language Canton Network applications are written in. Mewt now reads DAML, generates several classes of mutants (including

items.title: XRP jumps 4% as traders watch 'triangle breakout' toward $1.35
items.summary: XRP pushed higher over 24 hours and tested short-term resistance, but the larger chart still needs a clean break above the $1.24-$1.28 supply zone to confirm a stronger reversal.

items.title: Live markets: Bitcoin ETFs post a fifth straight day of inflows in a first since April
items.summary: The run has pulled in roughly $727 million, the most sustained stretch of buying since the record outflows of June.

items.title: UK Parliament begins inquiry into banking chokepoint for crypto businesses
items.summary: The U.K.’s Crypto and Digital Assets All-Party Parliamentary Group (APPG) is focused on banks that refused crypto firms accounts or introduced restrictions on crypto transactions.

items.title: Bitcoin hits a two-week high near $65,500 as the chip trade turns back into a tailwind
items.summary: Asian semiconductor shares rebounded hard, a five-day ETF inflow streak passed $600 million, and oil pulled back on Middle East diplomacy.

items.title: UK parliamentary group probes banking barriers for crypto firms
items.summary: A UK parliamentary group launched an inquiry into banking restrictions on crypto firms and consumers, including their impact on investment and competition.

items.title: Bitcoin ETFs post five-day inflow streak, longest since May
items.summary: US spot Bitcoin ETFs recorded $227 million in inflows as BTC climbed above $65,000, extending their longest winning streak since early May.

items.title: Base’s 1:1-backed tokenized equities launch ‘imminent,’ Pollak says
items.summary: The Coinbase-backed Ethereum layer-2 is preparing to expand its financial offerings as it pivots away from its earlier social-first strategy.

items.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
items.summary: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.

items.title: Grayscale files S-1 for first US Worldcoin ETF
items.summary: The filing expands Grayscale’s growing lineup of crypto-related exchange-traded products outside of Bitcoin and Ether.

items.title: Celsius co-founders Leon, Goldstein to pay FTC over $6M
items.summary: The settlements add to former Celsius CEO Alex Mashinsky’s $10 million FTC settlement in April.

items.title: Binance & OKX users face $1,900 fines in Vietnam, Coinbase in China? Asia Express
items.summary: Retail users in Vietnam who trade on offshore crypto exchanges like Binance or OKX face heavy penalties. Network School controversy in Malaysia over Israeli citizen ban.

items.title: London Stock Exchange eyes overnight trading launch in 2027: FT
items.summary: The move comes as traditional exchanges face growing competition from crypto markets and tokenized equity platforms that offer around-the-clock trading.

items.title: Patrick Witt defers military training as CLARITY heads to Senate
items.summary: The decision keeps the administration’s chief crypto policy negotiator in place during what could be a decisive few weeks for the CLARITY Act.

items.title: Exodus to cut 25% of global workforce in payments shift
items.summary: This restructuring is part of a strategy to build a full-stack payments platform following the company's acquisitions of Monavate and Baanx.

items.title: AI compute stocks bounce as Hut 8, IREN land billions in new contracts
items.summary: The deals sparked a rebound in AI compute stocks after investors questioned demand for new data center capacity.
